title: medicago minima subvar. canescens
intro: Medicago minima subvar. canescens, also known as the small purple medick, is a subvariety of the small medick plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Medicago minima subvar. canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
